creator: m.viey@wanadoo.fr
text:
I have completely removed devel/ncurses and rebuilt the 3 ports which were depending on:

- python39
- emacs
- cmus

None of these package need it and work with base ncurses.

emacs and python39 seems to work (I just tried an import with python, so I am not sure).

Only cmus has this ui issue. I suspect an issue with termcap  as cmus seems to use terminfo.
